backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for a digital marketing agency backend that stores and retrieves contact inquiries, exposes submitInquiry/getInquiries/getInquiryById query/update methods, and returns static contact info. Includes blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the DMTI logo replacement in Navbar and Footer components has been implemented, referencing the relevant source files and test ID REQ-14.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short descriptions, serving as a reference index for the project's React component and hook structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH design tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO title and meta description for Digital Marketing Town agency, mounting the React app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders LandingPage as the sole page of the single-page application.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Two-column contact section with agency info (phone, address, email, website) on the left and an inquiry form with service dropdown, backend submission via useSubmitInquiry, loading/error/success states on the right.
Empty file placeholder for the courses overview component.
frontend/src/components/CTABanner.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the CTA banner component.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Accordion FAQ section with 8 questions covering course details, certifications, placement, and support, using local open/close toggle state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Four-column agency footer displaying the DMTI logo, tagline, social media icon links, quick navigation links, services list, and contact details with a caffeine.ai attribution line.
frontend/src/components/GalleryPromotion: Renders a responsive image gallery section displaying nine promotional marketing campaign images for Digital Marketing Town in a 3-column grid with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, contact details, stat badges, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the contact and services sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Free Consultation' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu that smooth-scrolls to page sections.
frontend/src/components/OurMoments.tsx: Displays a 3-column photo grid of real-world company events and government meetings, with hover-reveal captions and orange accent styling.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a grid of seven service cards (SMM, SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, Web Design, Web Dev, Hosting) each with an icon, description, deliverables list, and a CTA that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Displays a 3-column grid of six client testimonial cards with star ratings, avatar initials, quotes, and client details for Digital Marketing Town.
Renders a section with three embedded YouTube videos (course preview, testimonials, campus tour) in a responsive grid, plus a subscribe CTA link to the DMTI YouTube channel.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Displays a 6-card grid highlighting DMTI's key differentiators (proven results, targeted campaigns, certified experts, ROI focus, dedicated support, full-service) with icons and highlight badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for submitting inquiries (mutation) and fetching inquiries and contact info (queries) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Syne fonts, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the dark navy/orange theme, and adds Tailwind utility classes for gradients, card hover effects, and glow styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by assembling all section components (Navbar, Hero, Services, WhyChooseUs, Gallery, Moments, Videos, Testimonials, ContactForm, FAQ, Footer) in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Inter/Syne fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, brand-specific color aliases, custom border radii, and box shadows, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 13) for a Digital Marketing Town e-commerce/landing page, listing existing features, architectural notes, image requirements, and known issues.
